text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is just so fast... I tried to catch up to
them but it was impossible.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Even with all of the training we've been doing... Sniffle...
choice_data_list: Don't be so hard on yourself. We can try again.
Don't be so hard on yourself. We can try again.

Don't cry! You're gonna be the top Umamusume
in all of Japan, right?

Don't cry! You're gonna be the top Umamusume
in all of Japan, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'll do my best! I'll work super hard and... and... definitely win next time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Especially since you're always right by my side
doing the same!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll never be the top Umamusume in
all of Japan if all I do is just sit here and cry.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And watch over me until I become the top
Umamusume in all of Japan!
